installCommand: cd ../../.. && corepack enable pnpm && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
buildCommand: cd ../../.. && pnpm build --filter '@fintracker-vault/*' && pnpm --filter vault run build
ignoreCommand: if [ -z "${VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF:-}" ] || [ "$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF" = "main" ]; then exit 1; else exit 0; fi
